name: Truly Chicken Fillets For Dog 360g
shortDescription: Treat your furry friend to the delicious taste of 100% real chicken with Truly Chicken Fillets . These tender, high-quality fillets are packed with protein to support your dog’s health and vitality. Perfect for rewarding good behavior, as a snack, or adding a tasty boost to their meals. Your dog will love every bite!
